title.rendered: Send More, Spend Less: Why More Brits Are Choosing Travel FX for International Money Transfers

content.rendered:
Sending money abroad has traditionally been expensive, slow, and often confusing, with hidden fees and unfavourable exchange rates making the process more frustrating than it should be. But that is changing.

As more people in the UK invest, relocate, study, or support family overseas, a growing number are turning to online international money transfer services like Travel FX, and saving significant amounts in the process.

Whether you’re paying for a property in Portugal, covering tuition fees in Canada, or sending funds to loved ones, Travel FX offers a faster, more cost-effective, and transparent way to transfer money internationally.

 “We Saved Over £900 Transferring Our House Deposit”

When Matt and Sarah decided to buy their dream holiday home in Spain, their solicitor initially quoted them an exchange rate from a well-known UK bank. They were prepared to accept it until they discovered Travel FX.

After obtaining a quote online, they realised they could secure a significantly better exchange rate, saving them over £900 on the transfer. “It was easy, secure, and much faster than we expected,” says Matt. “We even received email updates so we knew exactly when the money landed.”

Why Choose Travel FX?

No Hidden Fees

We believe in complete transparency. Many companies advertise fee-free transfers but hide costs within poor exchange rates. Travel FX displays both your rate and fee clearly from the outset.

More Competitive Rates

Unlike banks and traditional currency brokers, we do not have large offices or commission-based dealers. By operating online, we keep overheads low and pass those savings directly to you through better exchange rates.

Fast, Online Transfers

Our platform allows you to transfer money from the comfort of your home or office. There is no need for lengthy calls with brokers or queues at the bank. It is straightforward, secure, and designed to save you time.

Regulated and Reliable

Travel FX uses industry-leading technology and works with FCA-regulated partners to ensure your funds are protected and delivered safely every time.

How It Works

1. Choose your currencies
Start by selecting which currency you are sending from and which one your recipient needs to receive.

2. Enter the amount
You can enter either the amount you want to send or the amount your recipient needs to receive. We will calculate the rest and provide the live exchange rate and total cost.

3. Fill in your details
Complete our international payment form with your personal details. This information is required to comply with UK financial regulations. Your data is secure and never shared.

4. Transfer your funds
Once you confirm the transaction, we will provide our bank details so you can transfer the funds to us via bank transfer.

5. We send the money
As soon as we receive your funds, we will send the money securely to your recipient. You will receive email updates throughout the process, including confirmation of receipt.

Who Uses Travel FX?

Our international money transfer service is suitable for a wide range of needs, including:

  • Purchasing or selling overseas property

  • Paying international tuition or school fees

  • Sending money to family and friends

  • Managing invoices or payments for international business

  • Covering costs for weddings, holidays, or events abroad

Whether you are making a one-off transfer or arranging regular payments, Travel FX gives you better rates, greater value, and peace of mind.

Get Started Today

Travel FX offers a reliable, efficient, and cost-effective alternative to traditional banks and brokers. Check our rates and send money abroad with confidence.

Start your international money transfer now

itemListElement.name: Send More, Spend Less: Why More Brits Are Choosing Travel FX for International Money Transfers

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
